metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🛡️ Perimeter Breach Detection
---
Correlates firewall allow/deny events with downstream web server activity to detect confirmed perimeter breaches. A firewall allow followed by web exploit attempts or error spikes from the same source IP is a confirmed breach — not just a noisy alert."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📊 Firewall Overview"},"name":"fw-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| summarize
    TotalEvents = count(),
    Allowed = countif(DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')),
    Denied = countif(DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')),
    UniqueSourceIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    UniqueVendors = dcount(DeviceVendor)
| project TotalEvents, Allowed, Denied, UniqueSourceIPs, UniqueVendors","size":4,"title":"Firewall traffic summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalEvents","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-fw"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), DeviceAction
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow', 'deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| sort by TimeGenerated asc","size":3,"title":"Allow vs deny trend","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"linechart"},"customWidth":"60","name":"chart-fw-trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| summarize DenyCount = count() by SourceIP
| sort by DenyCount desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Top denied source IPs","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"DenyCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":1000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-top-denied"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔴 Breach Candidates — Firewall Allow → Web Attack"},"name":"breach-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let AllowedIPs = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize AllowCount = count(), LastAllowed = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceIP;
let WebAttacks = W3CIISLog
| where scStatus startswith '4' or scStatus startswith '5'
| where isnotempty(cIP)
| summarize WebErrors = count(), LastError = max(TimeGenerated), URIs = make_set(csUriStem, 5) by cIP;
AllowedIPs
| join kind=inner (
    WebAttacks | project SourceIP = cIP, WebErrors, LastError, URIs
) on SourceIP
| project SourceIP, AllowCount, LastAllowed, WebErrors, LastError, URIs
| sort by WebErrors desc","size":0,"title":"IPs allowed through firewall that then generated web server errors — breach candidates","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AllowCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":1000}},{"columnMatch":"WebErrors","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":500}},{"columnMatch":"LastAllowed","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"LastError","formatter":6}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"WebErrors","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-breach-candidates"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let AllowedIPs = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize by SourceIP;
W3CIISLog
| where isnotempty(cIP)
| join kind=inner (AllowedIPs | project cIP = SourceIP) on cIP
| where csUriStem has_any ('../', '.php?', 'cmd=', 'exec=', 'passwd', 'etc/passwd', 'select+', 'union+', '<script', 'eval(', 'base64')
| project TimeGenerated, cIP, csMethod, csUriStem, csUriQuery, scStatus, csUserAgent, Computer
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Web exploit attempts from firewall-allowed IPs","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-web-exploits"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🌍 Geo & Protocol Analysis"},"name":"geo-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')
| where isnotempty(DestinationPort)
| summarize AllowCount = count() by DestinationPort, ApplicationProtocol
| sort by AllowCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Top allowed destination ports & protocols","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AllowCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":10000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-allowed-ports"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| where isnotempty(DestinationPort)
| summarize DenyCount = count() by DestinationPort, ApplicationProtocol
| sort by DenyCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Top denied destination ports & protocols","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"DenyCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":10000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-denied-ports"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize AllowCount = count() by SourceIP
| sort by AllowCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Most active allowed source IPs","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AllowCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":10000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-active-sources"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
